name: pr_cep_expwin_inside
drl: rule R when $a : A($ac : acct) $b : B(acct == $ac, this after[0ms,10000ms] $a) then end
_finding: Explicit expires SHORTER than a temporal window, partner INSIDE the surviving prefix (3000 < 5000): the join fires — the truncated window's live part works. Control for the expwin pair (D-219; black-box review found the corner unpinned).
